name: North Carolina BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Gradually add brown sugar, stirring until it dissolves and the mixture begins to bubble.
3. Remove from heat and stir in vinegar until any lumps are dissolved.
4. Add celery seed, onion, garlic, Hienz 57 Sauce, vinegar, dry mustard, and red pepper flakes.
5. Stir to combine all ingredients.
6. Return saucepan to low heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the mixture thickens.
7. Taste and add more garlic if desired.
8. Add red pepper flakes to taste.
